description: Enforce canonical billing vocabulary `fixed|hourly|usage` and reject/normalize legacy `per_unit` inputs at all write boundaries.
Introduce mode-specific catalog default pricing storage keyed by service, billing_mode, currency, tenant with strict uniqueness.
Run one-way migration/backfill from existing catalog defaults into mode-specific default pricing and fail if required mappings are missing.
Remove fixed-step wizard picker filtering by catalog billing method while preserving `item_kind=service` constraint.
Remove hourly-step wizard picker filtering by catalog billing method while preserving `item_kind=service` constraint.
Remove usage-step wizard picker filtering by catalog billing method while preserving `item_kind=service` constraint.
Apply identical picker policy to template wizard fixed/hourly/usage service steps.
Replace fixed-service server submit billing-method rejection with contract-context validation rules only.
Replace hourly-service server submit billing-method rejection with contract-context validation rules only.
Replace usage-service server submit billing-method rejection with contract-context validation rules only.
Update contract line service attach actions to validate by target line mode/context instead of catalog billing method.
Implement fixed-line rate default prefill from mode-specific catalog defaults with clear override semantics.
Implement hourly-line rate default prefill from mode-specific catalog defaults with clear override semantics.
Implement usage-line rate default prefill from mode-specific catalog defaults with clear override semantics.
Update contract-line service form metadata to display effective billing mode and default-rate source.
Ensure contract wizard draft/resume faithfully round-trips decoupled service selections and prefills.
Ensure template wizard draft/resume faithfully round-trips decoupled service selections and prefills.
Remove unconditional time-entry null-line fallback allocation from billing engine contract-line loops.
Remove unconditional usage-record null-line fallback allocation from billing engine contract-line loops.
Allocate unassigned time only when service-based contract-line disambiguation resolves uniquely.
Allocate unassigned usage only when service-based contract-line disambiguation resolves uniquely.
Enforce service-membership checks so records cannot bill through contract lines that do not include that service.
Preserve hourly rounding/minimum/overtime behavior after allocation rewrites.
Preserve usage minimum/custom-rate/tiering behavior after allocation rewrites.
Preserve bucket overage behavior after allocation rewrites.
Materialize unresolved approved billable time as explicit non-contract invoice candidates.
Materialize unresolved approved billable usage as explicit non-contract invoice candidates.
Expose non-contract candidates in grouped automatic invoicing as first-class selectable children.
Support generating only contract-backed selections without consuming non-contract candidates.
Support generating only non-contract selections without consuming contract-backed candidates.
Apply compatibility checks for mixed contract/non-contract combined generation (client/window/currency/tax/export/PO).
Update preview/generation summaries to explicitly state one-invoice vs multi-invoice outcomes for mixed selections.
Update service catalog API filtering/sorting to decoupled semantics while preserving query correctness.
Update shared billing-clients service query helpers to decoupled semantics.
Update scheduling time-entry service lookup APIs to stop using catalog billing method as service identity/type proxy.
Update client-portal availability service mapping to decoupled semantics.
Update product catalog create/update logic to canonical mode behavior with no active `per_unit` writes.
Update service API schemas to hard-cutover decoupled contracts with no legacy alias compatibility.
Update product API schemas to hard-cutover canonical vocabulary with no legacy alias compatibility.
Update financial/contract-line schemas and shared interfaces to hard-cutover decoupled semantics.
Update onboarding service/service-type creation flows to stop enforcing identity-level billing-mode coupling.
Update service settings forms to stop auto-overwriting billing behavior from service-type selection.
Update usage tracking service pickers to contract-context behavior instead of catalog-method gating.
Remove stale compatibility branches and static-fallback paths so the codebase operates in single-mode hard-cutover state.
